acceptance.assertion: Already-executed mutating children remain visible after later failure.
Receipts include enough recovery evidence for manual or external rollback.
The design explicitly separates receipt visibility from automatic rollback execution.

goal: Design how Mechanic sequences expose already-executed mutating children, manual recovery steps, and future rollback hooks when a later child blocks or fails.

metadata.reason: Automatic rollback would create new authority and belongs in a separate Recovery/Captain design.

title: Design mechanic recovery receipts
